Projects &
Simulations

SOLAR POWERED EVs CHARGING STATION. KIGALI RWANDA
Final Year Project
☀ Solar Energy & E-Mobility
Solar Powered EVs Charging Station

AN engineered On-grid solar PV station powering 5 EV chargers in kigali City, Rwanda(At specific Packing Area). Designed the complete system from PV array sizing to battery buffer scheduling, built a real-time animated Python SCADA dashboard, and developed a full-stack Django web application with live IoT and MQTT monitoring .

MESHPOWER Rwanda Ltd
Present . Rwanda

Solar Powered EVs Charging Station · CST, University of Rwanda
2025–2026 · Kigali City
  • Designed complete 100.1kWp PV system: 143× Jinko 700W, 11 strings × 13 modules
  • Engineered 920kWh LFP battery buffer system with intelligent 24h scheduling
  • Sized 150kW on-grid inverter with 7-channel MPPT for 5-charger peak load of 98kW
  • Built full Python SCADA simulation with FuncAnimation, physics-accurate energy modelling
  • Performed complete techno-economic analysis: LCOE, NPV, IRR and ROI, FONERWA grant application
